name: vxformgenerator-scaffold
description: Scaffold editable Razor form components from annotated POCO models using VxFormGenerator.Tools.

vxFormGenerator.dotnetCommand.description: dotnet executable used to run VxFormGenerator.Tools from source.

vxFormGenerator.toolProjectPath.description: Workspace-relative path to VxFormGenerator.Tools.csproj. If missing, the extension falls back to 'vxform'.

vxFormGenerator.vxformCommand.description: Installed vxform tool command used when toolProjectPath is not found.

scripts.test:container: docker build -f Dockerfile.test -t vxformgenerator-vscode-extension-test . && docker run --rm vxformgenerator-vscode-extension-test
